easy.title: Character Frequency Counter
easy.description: Count occurrences of each letter in string using for loop.

medium.title: Parallel List Combination
medium.description: Given student names and marks lists, return list of strings 'Name: Score' for scores >= 50.

hard.title: Matrix Transpose
hard.description: Transpose a 2D matrix (swap rows and columns) using nested for loops.
hints: Result grid has dimensions cols x rows

debugging.title: Fix Range Off-by-One
debugging.description: Fix range boundary to include end number.
bugs: `range(1, n)` excludes n. Change stop bound to `n + 1`.
